message:
fix(tests): add type annotation in refinement map, add pool acquire-timeout regression test

- runtime_state_refinement_map.rs: Explicit `&Value` type annotation
  on the closure parameter in the required_artifacts map call,
  resolving a type inference ambiguity.

- pool_timeout_test.rs (NEW, 63L): Regression test for
  GenericPool::create respecting acquire_timeout.  Uses VirtualClock
  to deterministically verify that a slow factory triggers the
  timeout before the factory completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
